result:
**File**: `crates/lua-stdlib/src/state_stub.rs`, trait default at line 192 (target todo `get_stack`). All new code lives in the `impl LuaStateStubExt for LuaState` block (now ending around line ~1150).

**What `get_stack` does**: Delegates to `lua_vm::debug::get_stack` and stashes the resulting `CallInfoIdx` into a newly-added `LuaDebug.i_ci_idx` field so later `get_info`/`get_local_at` calls can resolve the frame (matches C's private `lua_Debug.i_ci` slot).

**Family members implemented (in-file, same impl block)**:
- `get_stack_level` — alias of `get_stack`.
- `get_info` — builds a `lua_vm::debug::LuaDebug` seeded with `i_ci_idx`, calls canonical `get_info`, then `copy_lvm_debug_to_stub` mirrors fields back (handles `what` byte ↔ `&[u8]` tag, `short_src` array↔Vec trim, `Option` flattening).
- `get_debug_info` — wraps `get_info`.
- `get_local_at` — bridges to `lua_vm::debug::get_local(Some(&lvm_ar), n)`.
- `set_local_at` — bridges to `lua_vm::debug::set_local`.
- `get_param_name` — `get_local(self, None, n)` (None-ar path reads param names from function on stack top).
- `has_frames` — `!state.is_base_ci(state.current_ci_idx())`.
- `lua_traceback` — delegates to `crate::auxlib::traceback`.

**Supporting change**: added private `i_ci_idx: Option<CallInfoIdx>` field to stub `LuaDebug` (file-local struct, `LuaDebug::default()` still works; no struct-literal callers); imported `CallInfoIdx` from `lua_types`. Added private `copy_lvm_debug_to_stub` helper.

**Newly-surfaced todos NOT implemented (different families)**: hook family (`set_hook_full`, `hook_is_set`, `hook_is_internal_lua_hook`, `get_hook_count`, `get_hook_mask`); warning family (`set_warn_fn`, `write_output`); `upvalue_id`, `join_upvalues`; `set_c_stack_limit`; `new_thread`, `is_same_thread`; `new_userdata_typed`, `get_iuservalue`, `set_iuservalue`.

**`cargo build -p lua-cli`**: green (warnings only, zero errors).

tool_input.command: cargo build -p lua-cli 2>&1 | grep -E "^error|^warning: \w" | head -20; echo "EXIT: $?"
